title: Moar Hammers
description: The Hammers Datapack adds a new tool to Minecraft that can be used to smash blocks into less solid versions. Cobblestone is smashed into gravel and gravel to gravel and gravel to sand. Concrete can also be pulverized back into concrete powder.
body:
Hammers

The datapack REQUIRES this Resource Pack.

The Hammers Data Pack adds a new tool to Minecraft, the Hammer. It comes in all varieties, wooden, stone, iron, gold, diamond, and netherite. The hammer can be used to smash blocks into less solid versions. Cobblestone is smashed into gravel and gravel to sand. Concrete can also be pulverized back into concrete powder. This pack is primarily intended to be used in a Skyblock setting, but will work in any world. So, what can this pack do? - **Craft Hammers:** In 1.21, you can make all the hammers in the Vanilla Crafting Table. The recipes show up in the Recipe Guide. In 1.20 and before… We used our simple custom crafter to allow for the crafting of hammers. Simply place a dropper facing upwards and throw a crafting table on it. Recipes below. - **Smash Blocks:** Hold the hammer in your hand and use it to break one of the blocks can be smashed! Simple and elegant. - **Bone Hammer:** Make a Hammer out of bones to smash sand into soul sand. - **Enjoy:** We hope you enjoy this little pack. We think it could be a very nice addition to skyblock worlds.

Learn more from this video:



NOTES TO YOUTUBERS: You may use this datapack in whatever video you like, free of charge. My only request: YOU MUST CREDIT ME for my work. Simply link to this page in your video’s description, pinned comment, or both AND verbally mention during the intro of your video that the pack can be downloaded using the link. “Download in the description” would suffice. To install, follow the instructions contained in the “instructions.txt” file included in the download. If you are still having issues installing or want help knowing how to do something with the pack, ask for help on our discord. Fully Multiplayer compatible!
